title: Decoherence Models
description: Explore the fundamental models of quantum decoherence including amplitude damping, phase damping, and depolarization.
learningObjectives: Understand the physics of T1 and T2 processes in qubits
Derive Kraus operators for common decoherence channels
Calculate decoherence rates from physical parameters
Model realistic noise in quantum systems
Connect microscopic models to phenomenological descriptions
